originalTitle: These women fought in Ethiopia's last civil war and warn against another one
title: These women fought in Ethiopia's last civil war and warn against another one
content: Female fighters recall how the conflict in the northern Tigray destroyed their lives, as fears grow that fighting could resume.

originalTitle: Conservative Anglicans pull back from electing rival to Archbishop of Canterbury
title: Conservative Anglicans pull back from electing rival to Archbishop of Canterbury
content: The group had said it would choose a new leader with the same title as Sarah Mullally, the first female head of the Church.

originalTitle: Caf postpones Wafcon 2026 just 12 days before kick-off
title: Caf postpones Wafcon 2026 just 12 days before kick-off
content: The 2026 Women's Africa Cup of Nations is postponed just 12 days before the finals were due to kick off in Morocco.

originalTitle: Sudanese army retakes Bara, secures el-Obeid in North Kordofan
title: Sudanese army retakes Bara, secures el-Obeid in North Kordofan
content: Source tells Al Jazeera army destroyed 32 RSF combat vehicles, killed dozens of RSF fighters in clashes, drone attacks.

originalTitle: Tehran hit by heavy bombing on day seven of US-Israel war on Iran
title: Tehran hit by heavy bombing on day seven of US-Israel war on Iran
content: An Al Jazeera correspondent in Tehran describes the bombardment in Iran's capital as more intense than previously seen.

originalTitle: Iran war: What is happening on day seven of US-Israel attacks?
title: Iran war: What is happening on day seven of US-Israel attacks?
content: After six days of US-Israeli attacks on Iran, the conflict is escalating as regional tensions rise.

originalTitle: 'What is the game plan?': The Iran war is unsettling China and its ambitions
title: 'What is the game plan?': The Iran war is unsettling China and its ambitions
content: China is not feeling the shock of war in the Middle East - yet. But it is feeling the ripples.

originalTitle: Trump cuts his losses on Noem after controversial tenure at homeland security
title: Trump cuts his losses on Noem after controversial tenure at homeland security
content: Noem was one of the administration's brightest stars when she stepped into the role, but has faced a mounting backlash in recent months.

originalTitle: US and Venezuela agree to resume diplomatic ties after Maduro capture
title: US and Venezuela agree to resume diplomatic ties after Maduro capture
content: The US said the two sides would make joint efforts to promote stability after the US seized Maduro and his wife.

originalTitle: Disillusionment and disbelief - thousands leave early with Spurs in freefall
title: Disillusionment and disbelief - thousands leave early with Spurs in freefall
content: Only three games in, Tottenham's head coach is facing crisis. Igor Tudor refused to comment on whether he is about to be sacked - but said some players will need "to leave the boat".

originalTitle: 'Howard Webb, where are you?' - How we can stop VAR ruining football
title: 'Howard Webb, where are you?' - How we can stop VAR ruining football
content: In his BBC Sport column, former Premier League boss Tony Pulis explains how VAR has become a monster, and why people in the game should be asked how to fix it.

originalTitle: Forest tell Edu to stay away from training ground
title: Forest tell Edu to stay away from training ground
content: Nottingham Forest global head of football Edu is asked to stay away from the club's training ground.
